onboarding.languageSubtitle: You can change this anytime later from the app.
onboarding.welcomeTitle: Begin your spiritual journey with clarity
onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Daily Panchang, Swami Ji's schedule, wisdom content, seva opportunities, and Ashram updates in one calm place.
onboarding.footer: By continuing, you agree to receive a respectful and personalized spiritual experience from AvdheshanandG Mission.

slides.panchangTitle: Begin each day with Panchang and sacred timing
slides.panchangDescription: Stay aligned with tithi, nakshatra, muhurta, and city-specific spiritual timing.
slides.scheduleTitle: Follow Swami Ji's latest schedule and darshan updates
slides.scheduleDescription: See Ashram visits, public programmes, and approved appointment windows in one place.
slides.wisdomTitle: Read, watch, and reflect with Swami Ji's teachings
slides.wisdomDescription: Access articles, books, podcasts, and video series curated for your daily sadhana.
slides.sevaTitle: Support seva, volunteer, and stay part of the mission
slides.sevaDescription: Donate securely, explore Ashram initiatives, and stay close to the work that matters.

onboarding.notificationsTitle: Receive sacred reminders and timely updates
onboarding.notificationsSubtitle: Let us gently remind you about daily Panchang, important darshan updates, and special satsang moments.

notificationsBenefits.panchang: Daily Panchang and Brahma Muhurta reminders
notificationsBenefits.schedule: Swami Ji's schedule changes and darshan alerts
notificationsBenefits.satsang: Special satsang, event, and Ashram update notifications

onboarding.locationTitle: Use your location for more accurate Panchang guidance
onboarding.locationSubtitle: Your city helps us show sunrise, muhurta, and festival timing with better accuracy.

locationBenefits.panchang: More accurate Panchang for your current city
locationBenefits.city: Faster city-based schedule and Ashram guidance

onboarding.locationErrorMessage: We could not access your location right now. You can choose your city later from Panchang.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.introText: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.successMessage:
Thank you for reaching out to us. We will respond to your inquiry soon.

Hari Om 🙏

errors.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters

panchangNotifications.heroSubtitle: Receive Panchang summary, festival alerts, and auspicious timings at Brahma Muhurta (4:30 AM) in your chosen language.
panchangNotifications.enabledMessage: You will receive daily Panchang alerts at Brahma Muhurta time.
panchangNotifications.permissionDeniedMessage: Please enable notifications in your device settings to receive Panchang alerts.

panchangNotifications.dailyPanchangDescription: Tithi, Nakshatra, sunrise, and muhurta timings
panchangNotifications.festivalAlertsDescription: Get notified about upcoming Hindu festivals
panchangNotifications.brahmaMuhurtaDescription: Alert at the most auspicious time for meditation (4:30 AM)
panchangNotifications.notificationLanguageSubtitle: Choose the language for your daily Panchang alerts
panchangNotifications.footerNote: Notifications are sent at Brahma Muhurta based on your city's sunrise time. The exact time varies by location and season.
